demographics.living_situation: in a relationship; partner left tonight after a conflict

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My relationship is falling apart and I just had a full-blown panic attack — I couldn't breathe, my heart was pounding. No matter what I do it's over before it even begins in bed and I have zero control over it. I feel completely broken.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A huge argument with my partner tonight about this tipped me over the edge into a panic attack and I need help calming down and working out what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sexual problem has been going on consistently for a long time; tonight's panic attack came on suddenly after an argument with my partner
symptom_narrative.duration: the panic has lasted the last hour or so; the sexual issue has been ongoing for as long as I can remember with this partner
symptom_narrative.character: I finish within about a minute of starting, sometimes before we've even really started, and I can't hold it back at all; right now I'm shaking, sweating and my chest feels tight from panicking
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tonight feels like the worst it's ever been emotionally — I feel completely broken and panicked
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the panic is in my chest and breathing; the sexual problem is obviously that side of things
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the quick finishing happens every single time we have sex; the intense nerves always build up before sex
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps the finishing; the panic eases a tiny bit if I try to slow my breathing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the more I worry about it happening, the faster it happens, and tonight the argument made everything spiral
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: racing heart, fast breathing, sweating, trembling, feeling like something awful is happening — all since the argument
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the quick finishing has happened for a long time; I've had bad nerves before sex before but never a panic attack like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've started avoiding intimacy completely and it's wrecking my relationship

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've always finished too quickly during sex, but I've never had it properly looked at

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: in a relationship that is under severe strain because of this; partner walked out tonight after the argument; I'm home on my own

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, distressed messages, catastrophising about the relationship and about being 'broken'

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding really fast right now
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective sensation during panic, not a measured rate

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing really fast and can't seem to catch my breath
